item.title: ZmSMC3
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Gene Symbol: ZmSMC3 Gene Name: Structural Maintenance of Chromosome3 Genome: Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: The Cohesin Complex Subunit ZmSMC3 Participates in Meiotic Centromere Pairing in Maize.
